Package me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI.events

package me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI.events
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI
     
    me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI.chatPipeline
     
    me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI.interfaces
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    YoChatChannelJoinEvent
    Fired before a player is added to a YoChat channel.
    YoChatChannelLeaveEvent
    Fired before a player is removed from a YoChat channel.
    YoChatMessageEvent
    Fired after the pipeline has produced the message component but before final send handling.
    YoChatPipelineEvent
    Fired immediately after YoChat's internal pipeline has executed.
    YoChatSendEvent
    Fired right before YoChat hands the message off for final delivery.
